title: Triglyceride Analysis Protocol
author: John Stack
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.y4bfysn

steps.title: Calibrate Cobas for Triglyceride analysis by...
steps.instruction: Calibrate Cobas for Triglyceride analysis by running a multi-analyte calibrator and two control serum.

steps.title: Sample handling as performed by Cobas Mira Plus
steps.instruction: Sample handling as performed by Cobas Mira Plus. a) Pipette 4 µL of sample into cuvette. b) Add 275 µL of Triglyceride liquid reagent. c) Incubate at 37ºC for 10 minutes. d) Absorbance is measured at 500nm.
